description: Structural contract for ship-report.md handoff artifacts (C2-handoff-schemas). The Ship phase records the atomic merge: tree SHA, commit, ledger entry.

required_first_line.fail_message: challenge token missing from line 1 — report may be a forgery

required_sections.name: commit
required_sections.fail_message: ## Commit (or ANCHOR:commit) missing — Ship must record the merge commit SHA

required_sections.name: tree_sha_binding
required_sections.fail_message: ## Tree SHA (or ANCHOR:tree_sha_binding) missing — Ship must bind the audited tree SHA to prevent post-audit drift

required_sections.name: ledger_entry
required_sections.fail_message: ## Ledger (or ANCHOR:ledger_entry) missing — Ship must point at the SHA-chained ledger entry that records the ship

required_content.name: class_field
required_content.fail_message: ship class (cycle|manual|release) not declared — required by v8.25.0+ ship.sh --class
